title: The One With The Engagement Picture

lines.text: Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Monica and Phoebe are going through a bunch of pictures as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Someone on the subway licked my neck! Licked my neck!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh Willie's still alive!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What are you guys doing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, my mom called, they're gonna run our engagement announcement in the local paper, so we're looking for a good picture of us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oooh, I'm afraid that does not exist.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's not true, there are great pictures of us!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, there are great pictures of you standing next to a guy who's going like this... (Makes what can only be described as a toothy frown. Henceforth, this shall be known as The Face.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! That's the creep that you're with at the Statue of Liberty.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know what it is, I just can't take a good picture.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking at one) Oh, here's a great one.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I'm not in that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know, but look at me all tan.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, why don't you guys go, get portraits done by a professional photographer.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's a good idea! I bet they have one of those wind machines! Y'know... (Does the whole hair blowing in the wind model type poses.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah that's great! Next to that, Chandler won't look so stupid.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler what do you say?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, but I should warn you, I'm not going. I'm going. (Does The Face while saying that last part.)
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Rachel is siting on the couch as Ross and Chandler enter after playing basketball.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Chandler) Dude, that reverse lay-up! Oh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How about those three pointers?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Amazing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And those guys were this (Doing the standard "This Close" gesture) close to lettin' us play this time too.
They both get dejected and go sit down.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey look-look, Phoebe's talking to uh, Cute Coffeehouse Guy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, you guys call him Cute Coffeehouse Guy, we call him Hums While He Pees.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, and we call Ross Lingers In The Bathroom.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (returning) Hey you guys, Hums While He Pees just asked me out!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, I thought that guy was married.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He is! But he's getting divorced-Ross! Maybe you know him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's not a club.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe, if this guy's going through a divorce, is it such a good idea to start going out with him?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, divorced men are not bad men!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They have that on the napkins at the club.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I gotta get back to work.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You don't have to be back for a half-hour!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah but, my assistant Tag does sit-ups in the office during lunch. Ohh! I could just spread him on a cracker.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Rach, if you have a crush on this guy, why would you hire him? I mean y'know you can't date him right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no, I know that. I know that. Although, we made a joke that we spend so much time together he should call me his work wife.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Soon he'll be able to call you, that lady he knew who got fired.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am not gonna get fired, because I'm not gonna act on it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So you wouldn't mind if he was dating someone else?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why? Is he? He is! Isn't he? He's dating that slut in marketing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Maybe I should open a divorced men's club.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Dude that is so sad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I could put uh-uh a basketball court in the back.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Could I play?
Rachel's Outer Office, she's returning from lunch to see Tag not doing his sit-ups.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, no sit-ups today Tag?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I just did them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, well drop and give me ten more!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh, I-I had a drink with lunch. Did those cost reports come in?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Yeah, I filled them out last night?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, great could you make me four copies of those?
He gets up to make the copies leaving Rachel alone with his stuff. She notices his sweater in his backpack and holds it up to her nose as Melissa, a coworker, walks up.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Hey Rachel!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (startled) Ahh, hi! Hi! Melissa, what's up? I'm just uh, about to umm, go out to the store to get some stuff to put in my backpack. Y'know, like dried fruit and granola and stuff. What's up? (She has put on the backpack.)

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Umm, is Tag here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Oh, I was gonna talk to him about doing something tonight.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?! Got a little crush on Tag there do ya?

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Well, we've been flirting back and forth, but I was hoping that tonight it would turn into something a little more than that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, whoa-whoa easy there Melissa! This ain't a locker room, okay? But, y'know I remember him saying that-that he had plans tonight.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Oh no!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah. All right, back to work.

lines.speaker: Melissa
lines.text: Hey! Isn't that Tag's backpack.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah Melissa, I don't want to be known as the uh, office bitch, but I will call your supervisor.
Melissa beats a hasty retreat.
A Portrait Studio, Chandler and Monica are trying to take their engagement picture. Monica has a beautiful smile, while Chandler isn't.

lines.speaker: The Photographer
lines.text: (taking pictures) Great! That's great Monica! Great! Now, Chandler, you want to give us a smile?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (Does The Face.)

lines.speaker: The Photographer
lines.text: I'm sorry, is the seat uncomfortable?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I am.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, listen to me sweetie, I know you can do this. Okay? You have a beautiful smile.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do? (He smiles, beautifully.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! (They turn to the camera, and Chandler does The Face again.) All right, maybe you don't have to smile. Let's try something else. Let's try umm, try looking sexy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (You'll have to see it, I can't describe the face he makes, but it isn't good.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Or not.
Rachel's Office, Joey is knocking on the door holding a hand over a spot on his shirt.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi Joey! What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhh, well I've got an audition down the street and I spilled sauce all over the front of my shirt. (Removes his hand to reveal a huge sauce stain.) You got an extra one?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, sure. Umm...here. (Hands him one.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great. (He doesn't like it.) You got anything that's not Ralph Lauren?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I don't think so Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, I guess this will be fine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, listen umm, what-what are you doing tonight?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nothing, why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How would you feel about taking out my assistant Tag? I'll pay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Huh, Rach I got to say it's gonna take a lot of money for me to go out on a date with a dude.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not asking you to go on a date with him!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really? 'Cause I could kinda use the money.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, just-just he-he's new in town and I know he doesn't have any guy friends. Just take him to like a ball game or something. I'll really appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure, no problem. (Sees something.) Ooh-Hey, donuts!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. (He grabs a jelly donut, takes a bite, and guess what he spills all over himself. He tries to clean it up and smears it all over the shirt.)
A Portrait Studio, Chandler and Monica are still trying to get the picture taken.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know. Let's try a look...of far off...wonderment. Okay, we'll-we'll gaze into our future and we'll think about our marriage and the days to come. (Chandler is still not getting it.) Chandler! What is the matter with your face?! I mean this picture is supposed to say "Geller and Bing to be married," not "Local woman saves drowning moron!" (The photographer laughs.) Hey! Don't laugh at him! He's my drowning moron!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aww! (Smiles.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's it! Take it! Take it! Take it!
Chandler turns to the camera and does The Face.
Central Perk, Chandler, Monica, and Ross are going over the picture proofs.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I like this one. (Points to it.) It seems to say, "I love you and that's why I have to kill you."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: They can't all be bad. (To Chandler) Find the one where you make your bedroom eyes. Ohh, there it is.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God! Those are my bedroom eyes?! Why did you ever sleep with me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you really want to pull at that thread?
Phoebe enters with Hums While He Pees also known as Kyle.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm having a really good time!

lines.speaker: Hums While He Pees
lines.text: Me too! I'm sorry that guy in the subway licked your neck.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh. No that's okay, he's a friend.

lines.speaker: Hums While He Pees
lines.text: Hey uh, I don't mean to be presumptuous but I have these two tickets to the ballroom dancing finals tomorrow night if you want to go?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I... Well y'know I-I mean I missed the-the semi-finals, so I'd just be lost.

lines.speaker: Hums While He Pees
lines.text: I know it's really lame, but I got these tickets from my boss and-Oh no! No! No! My God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, don't freak out. I'll go.

lines.speaker: Hums While He Pees
lines.text: No it's... Uh, my ex-wife Whitney is out there. I cannot deal with her right now. That woman is crazy!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, I know. Hold on. (She walks over to the couch.) Hey Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, umm that's Whitney (Points), Kyle's ex-wife out there, now do you think that you can y'know divert her so that we can slip out?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well okay but I have two tickets to the ballroom dance finals. (She holds up the tickets that Kyle gave her.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I don't think so Pheebs. (Pause) All right, I'll do it. But just because you're a friend. (Grabs the tickets and heads to divert Whitney.)
Ross's apartment, Ross is dancing around his living room as Phoebe enters, catching and startling him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi Ginger.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right! I want my key back!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't have it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's right there! (Points to her hand.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ugh, okay Sherlock! (Hands over the key.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I'm sorry but you-you-you better go Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, well I just wanted to say thank you though for diverting Kyle's ex.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh yeah-No-You're welcome. We'll talk about it later.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.
Ross opens the door to reveal Whitney standing there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi Whitney.

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: Hi Ross! You ready for breakfast?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yep. (Phoebe slams the door shut.) Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Ross) Kyle's ex-wife? You were supposed to divert her not date her!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (opens the door and to Whitney) Hi! I'm sorry, but can you give me a second while I talk to this woman, who by the way did not spend the night.

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. (Closes the door.) (To Phoebe) I did divert her and we ended up having a great time! Okay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Watching ballroom dancing?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes! That's where we realized we were both super cool people!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well look-look, okay Ross, Kyle just told me some really bad stuff about her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Like she's really mean, and she's over critical, and-and-No! She will paint a room a really bright color without even checking with you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And! She uses sex as a weapon!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine! Thank you for warning me. At breakfast I'll be on full alert for room painting and sex weapons.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're still gonna go out with her?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, didn't you just hear what I said?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pheebs come on! I mean, consider the source! Of course her ex-husband's gonna say that stuff. Now, if you'll excuse me...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (interrupting him) No listen to me! She is crazy!

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: (outside the door) Uh, your door isn't sound proof.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You see? Nothing is good enough for her!
Rachel's Office, Tag is arriving as Rachel is standing there.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Good morning.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi Tag! Hey, so did you have fun with uh, with Joey last night?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Oh yeah! We went to the Knicks game.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh that's nice.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Then we went to this bar and he hooked us up with all these women!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wo-women? You mean like old women?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Well kinda old, like 30.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (Pause) Oh.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: And I never used to be able to just talk to girls in bars, but I got like 20 phone numbers last night.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's great! Wow man, so Joey must've really taught you some stuff huh?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: A little.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?
A beautiful women walks up.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: (To her, in the Joey voice) How you doin'?
Commercial Break
Joey and Rachel's, Joey is teaching Chandler how to smile. Chandler is smiling.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: See? That's a great smile! Easy. Natural. Now, pretend I have a camera. (Chandler immediately does The Face.) You're changing it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't help it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, all right, all right, all right, you wanna know what I do when I take resume shots?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Borrow money from me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, first-first of all, you want to make it look spontaneous. I look down (Looks down), look down, keep looking down; then I look up. (Looks up and smiles.) See? All right, now you try. Look down (Chandler looks down), you're looking down, keep looking down...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why is there jelly on your shoe?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I had a donut. (Chandler nods.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So uh, heard you had some fun with Tag last night.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! That guy's all right!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah and you had fun teaching him how to be all Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know, all the women.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey well, you can't teach someone to be good with women. Y'know, that's why I never had any luck with Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (Pause) I'm right here!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, would-would you mind just not going out with him again? Okay, just the idea of you and he and all these women, it's just-And I know he's my assistant and I can't date him-but it just bothers me, all right?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! No-no-no-no, you can't take him away from me! I got a great partner to pick up girls with! Finally!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm still right here!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, will you, will you at least tell him how hollow and unsatisfying this, dating tons of women thing is!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shocked) What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I just don't want him to meet anybody until I am over my crush-And I will get over it. It's-it's not like I love him, it's just physical! But-I mean I get crushes like this all the time! I mean hell, I had a crush on you when I first met ya!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know, Monica told me.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Did you have a crush on me, when you first met me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. Sure. (Joey nods his head questioningly and Rachel nods no.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Can you people not see me?! (He waves his arms around to get their attention.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Joey) So, will you talk to him?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know Rach.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, come on! I'll give you ten free Ralph Lauren shirts.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: One! (Pause.) No ten! You said ten! You can't take that back!
Central Perk, Joey is there as Tag enters carrying a bag.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Hey Joey, you wanted to talk to me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know. You uh, you got something for me?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Oh, yeah, this is from Rachel.
He hands Joey the bag and he quickly counts its contents.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ten. Okay. Now Tag there's such a thing as to many women.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, for you!
The Portrait Studio, Monica is waiting for Chandler to make another attempt at taking a good picture.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (seeing him approach) Hey! There you are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There I am!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, Joey said I uh, I needed to relax so he gave me an antihistamine.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, and then I fell asleep on the subway and went all the way to Brooklyn. Brooklyn is f-far!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, what were you thinking?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know, but don't worry, don't worry, because I know how to take a picture now. (They get ready) Okay, see? Look down (Looks down), look down, look down... (He falls asleep.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (awakens) Yeah! (Looks up and does The Face.)
Central Perk, Ross and Phoebe are there.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So, how are things going with crazy? Has she cooked your rabbit yet?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Listen, you are hearing one side of the story, okay-and F.Y.I she must've shown Kyle over 30 paint samples before she painted that room! And his response to each one was, "I don't give a tiny rat's ass."

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah well, maybe she should've spent a little less time decorating and a little more time in the bedroom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I don't think we are gonna have that problem, but maybe that's just because I am not emotionally unavailable!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You think he's emotionally unavailable?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I think he can be.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, maybe he wouldn't be she didn't bring the office home every night!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, excuse her for knowing what she wants to do with her life!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah well, she certainly knew what she was doing New Year's Eve 1997.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (angrily) I knew you were gonna throw that in my face!! That was three years ago! She apologized and she apologized! What more do you want?!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (gets up and starts to leave) We want the last six years back!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So do we!! So do we!! (Ross notices a couple has been staring at them.) I'm sorry you had to see that.
Rachel's Office, Tag is entering.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Good morning Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi! (He hands her, her mail) Thanks, hey so uh what'd you do last night?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Went out with Joey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah? Another night of birdogging the chickas?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: No. We had a really good talk. I don't think I'm gonna do that bar scene anymore.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I did not see that coming.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: It's just not really who I am. Y'know, I've always been happier when...Why am I telling you this? You don't care about this stuff.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no, yes I do! I do! I mean, come on go on, you were, you were saying I am happier when uh, y'know?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: When I'm in a relationship, I love having a girlfriend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Someone I can spoil, y'know?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sp-spoil?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Uh-huh! Let me ask you something?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Do you believe that there is one perfect person for everyone?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I-I'm startin' too.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: And if that person is already in your life, you should do something about it right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes! Hell yes!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: All right then, it's settled.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I'm gettin' back together with my ex-girlfriend.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'd love to!

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (panics, turns around, picks up the phone, and pretend to talk on it) Hello?! (Listens) Oh, yeah! (To Tag) This is gonna be a while. Excuse me. (Tag leaves and she closes the door behind him, disgustedly.) Yeah!
Central Perk, Ross and Phoebe are there again, only now they're not talking to each other. Phoebe is loudly stirring her coffee.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: My God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. Is that annoying? And speaking about being selfish in bed, how's Whitney?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well maybe she wouldn't have to be selfish in bed if someone else knew where everything was!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh he knows! (Quietly) For the most part.
Kyle and Whitney enter.

lines.speaker: Kyle
lines.text: Oh hey! Good, you're both here.

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: We kinda need to talk.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Both of you together?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wh-what's up?

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: Well, I went over to Kyle's last night to pick up a few things and we got to reminiscing...

lines.speaker: Kyle
lines.text: ...we talked through most of the night and we realized that the reason we were so angry at each other was because there are still feelings there. So... (Pause)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh just say it Kyle!

lines.speaker: Kyle
lines.text: We're gonna give it another try.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What about her whining and her constant need for attention?!

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: I'm gonna work on that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh right, because you're so capable of change.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Whitney) Y'know, he hums when he pees!

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: I do know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It makes him miss the bowl, but whatever.

lines.speaker: Whitney
lines.text: We're so sorry. (They get up to leave.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That's all right, we-we don't need you. In fact, hey I'm over it already.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, and y'know what? I don't give a tiny rat's ass.

lines.speaker: Kyle
lines.text: Yeah, we're gonna go. (They leave.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Phoebe) I'm sorry. Ugh, Pheebs, you were, you were right about her. Y'know, she did try to use sex as a weapon! Yeah, I hurt my back a little.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh. Y'know, he hums while he does other stuff to.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, were better off without them.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And y'know, even if they break up again, you'd better not let him in your sad men's club!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Divorced men's club.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Potato, Potaato. (She's pronounces potato with the both the short and long As.)
Ending Credits
Central Perk, Phoebe, Chandler, and Joey are there as Monica enters with the local paper that has the engagement picture in it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey guys check it out! My mom sent me the paper!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, let's see it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ahhh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (She opens it up and shows it to them.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah, that looks good.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You guys make a very attractive couple. (The camera cuts to a shot of the picture and we see that Monica is posing with Joey instead of Chandler.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, we look great together.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, we really do!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow! Imagine what our kids would look like!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, we don't have to imagine.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm marrying her.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We'll just see.
End
